evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Une culture d'équipe basée sur l'exécution rapide, l'autonomie totale et la confiance
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The JD explicitly frames the culture around rapid execution, AI-accelerated speed, and 'buy, don't build', with only a passing mention of data quality rigor, so velocity dominates.
evidence.domain_risk: calcul de l'économie unitaire/marges par fournisseur de données, scoring d'activation produit, prédiction du churn
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: The role affects business/commercial decisions (unit economics, churn prediction) at a B2B SaaS startup without regulatory or financial-reporting consequences, keeping it moderate.
evidence.data_team_maturity: vous ne rejoignez pas une équipe data : vous la créez
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: This is explicitly the company's first full-time data hire, tasked with creating the data team and function from scratch, a clear early-stage signal.
evidence.jd_authorship: pousser plus loin les modèles dbt et automatiser pour que chaque équipe (Sales, Marketing, Finance, Product) soit en autonomie complète via Basedash
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Precise named tools (BigQuery, dbt Cloud, Fivetran, Airbyte, Segment, Basedash, Cursor, Claude Code) and concrete two-phase mission give a clear picture of daily work, consistent with hiring-manager authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: mener des analyses complexes qui feront pivoter le business (calcul de l'économie unitaire/marges par fournisseur de données, scoring d'activation produit, prédiction du churn)
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The strategic phase of the role centers on revenue-driving business analyses (unit economics, churn, activation scoring) tied to sales/RevOps outcomes, a commercial orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The candidate is explicitly tasked with becoming a highly strategic partner driving business-pivoting analyses, a clear strategic ownership framing.
evidence.ai_role: Vous utilisez déjà au quotidien des outils comme Cursor ou Claude pour démultiplier votre vitesse d'exécution
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The candidate is expected to already use AI coding tools (Cursor, Claude Code) daily to accelerate their own dbt development work, making them an ai_user.
evidence.testing_framing: les fondations sont ultra-propres, documentées et testées
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing is mentioned as a property of the existing foundation the candidate inherits, not as an owned responsibility framed with an action verb for the new hire.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: No compliance, audit, or regulatory risk language appears; the only quality mention is that existing foundations are already clean and tested, not a risk register for the candidate to own.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: vous ne rejoignez pas une équipe data : vous la créez
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The mission is explicitly to create the data team and push the stack further as the first data hire, a greenfield framing despite inheriting clean foundations.
